mission.title: valkey: [NEW] Add CMake support
mission.description: [NEW] Add CMake support. Requested by 8+ users.

steps.title: Check current valkey setup
steps.description:
Verify your valkey version and configuration:
```bash
valkey-server --version
```
This feature requires a working valkey installation.

steps.title: Review valkey configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant valkey configuration:
We can support both Makefile and CMake compilation methods. This requirement is also mentioned in https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey/issues/17.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [NEW] Add CMake support
steps.description:
This PR was tested on:
- Amazon Linux 2
- Ubuntu 22.04
- AlmaLinux 9
- macOS Sonoma 14.7
- FreeBSD 9 -

on FreeBSD, we require `gmake` for building `valkey`

---

With this PR, users are able to build valkey using `CMake`.

## Example usage:

Build `valkey-server` in Release mode with TLS enabled
```yaml
mkdir build-release
cd $_
cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
         -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/tmp/valkey-install \
         -DWITH_MALLOC=jemalloc -DWITH_TLS=1
make -j$(nproc) install

# start valkey
/tmp/valkey-install/bin/valkey-server
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "[NEW] Add CMake support" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This PR was tested on:
- Amazon Linux 2
- Ubuntu 22.04
- AlmaLinux 9
- macOS Sonoma 14.7
- FreeBSD 9 -

on FreeBSD, we require `gmake` for building `valkey`

---

With this PR, users are able to build valkey using `CMake`.

## Example usage:

Build `valkey-server` in Release mode with TLS enabled and using `jemalloc` as the allocator:

```bash
mkdir build-release
cd $_
cmake ..
codeSnippets:
mkdir build-release
cd $_
cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
         -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/tmp/valkey-install \
         -DWITH_MALLOC=jemalloc -DWITH_TLS=1
make -j$(nproc) install

# start valkey
/tmp/valkey-install/bin/valkey-server

mkdir build-release-ut
cd $_
cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
         -DWITH_MALLOC=jemalloc -DBUILD_TESTS=1
make -j$(nproc)

# Run the tests
./bin/valkey-unit-tests

prerequisites.description: A working valkey installation or development environment.
